about.label: About Us
about.title: Solution-Oriented Service Excellence
about.p1: Merci Insurance is based in Erdemli, Mersin, serving clients in Turkey and the surrounding region. Our expert team provides solution-oriented support in insurance, real estate, citizenship, legal consulting, and much more.
about.p2: Putting client satisfaction first, we craft personalised solutions and stand by you every step of the way.

items.title: Insurance
items.desc: We provide comprehensive insurance packages tailored to your every need for clients in Mersin and Erdemli.

items.title: Real Estate
items.desc: Based in Erdemli, our expert team finds real estate solutions matching your budget and vision.

items.title: Residency & Citizenship
items.desc: Expert assistance for Turkish residency permits in Mersin and citizenship applications.

items.title: Legal Support
items.desc: Reliable legal consulting services from our Erdemli-based office for all your legal needs.

items.title: Sworn Translation
items.desc: Certified sworn translation of official documents, accurate and prompt.

items.title: Financial Advisory
items.desc: Professional financial consulting to reach your financial goals.

items.title: Transfer Services
items.desc: Safe and comfortable transfer services throughout the region.

items.title: Renovation
items.desc: Turnkey renovation and interior finishing solutions for properties across Mersin.

insurance.label: Insurance Services
insurance.title: For All Your Insurance Needs
insurance.desc: We cover all insurance needs — from vehicle and home to health and freight.

showcase.card2Desc: Our professional team transforms your property into your dream space — turnkey.
